metadata.description: Claude-native toolkit to run a service-business agency end-to-end. Pick a niche, stand up the agency site, generate landing pages and funnels, deliver client sites, ship them. Without AI slop.

plugins.name: agency-out-of-the-box
plugins.description: End-to-end service-agency toolkit. Six commands, eleven skills, five specialist agents, four industry overlays, anti-AI-slop QA gate that blocks deploys with lorem ipsum, fabricated testimonials, or buzzword headlines.
